title: halenia brevicornis var. micranthella
intro: Halenia brevicornis var. micranthella, also known as the Mountain Heliotrope, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine, known for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The Mountain Heliotrope has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
